nasb.text: For they were in three stories and had no pillars like the pillars of the courts; therefore the upper chambers were set back from the ground upward, more than the lower and middle ones.

esv.text: For they were in three stories, and they had no pillars like the pillars of the courts. Thus the upper chambers were set back from the ground more than the lower and the middle ones.

cnv.text: 第三層房子沒有柱子，不像外院的房子有柱子。因此，上層比下層和中層較窄。

ccb.text: 这建筑物不像外院那样有柱子，所以上层比中层和下层窄。
